info.title: esdata API
info.description: API de consulta fiscal-regulatoria con trazabilidad a fuente oficial, superficies de governance y workers observables via sync_log.

get.description: Return API runtime status and operational metadata. Use this before relying on tax or legal answers if the integration needs to verify service health.

Search consolidated Spanish laws (LIVA, LIRPF, LIS, etc.) by keyword. Returns matching articles with snippets and relevance scores. Filter by norma (e.g. LIVA, LIRPF), ambito, tipo, fuente, or vigencia.
Get metadata for a Spanish law by code (e.g. LIVA, LIRPF, LIS). Returns title, jurisdiction, document type, and coverage status.
Get the full text of a specific article from a law. Optionally filter by vigencia_en (YYYY-MM-DD) for historical versions. Returns the article text, validity dates, and confidence info.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Termino de busqueda en texto de doctrina
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Termino de busqueda en texto de doctrina

parameters.name: include_boe

schema.description: Incluir normas BOE relacionadas cuando apliquen
schema.title: Include Boe

parameters.description: Incluir normas BOE relacionadas cuando apliquen

get.description: Search interpretative doctrine from DGT (binding queries) or TEAC (resolutions). Returns doctrine documents with linked articles and confidence scores. Filter by tipo (consulta_vinculante, resolucion_teac), organismo_emisor, or fecha.
Get a specific doctrine document by reference (e.g. V0000-26, 00/1234/2024). Returns full text, linked articles, and confidence information.

get.summary: Classify AEAT model candidates for a fiscal scenario
get.description: Return AEAT model candidates for a described fiscal scenario. Classifications are confirmed, candidate, or requires verification based only on ESData evidence. Do not present a model as mandatory unless the response explicitly supports that claim and the confidence/review fields allow it.

parameters.name: clientes_residentes

schema.description: Si el supuesto incluye clientes residentes en Espana
schema.title: Clientes Residentes

parameters.description: Si el supuesto incluye clientes residentes en Espana

schema.description: Si el supuesto incluye clientes no residentes
schema.title: Clientes No Residentes

parameters.description: Si el supuesto incluye clientes no residentes

parameters.name: tipo_renta

schema.description: Tipo de renta u operacion economica, ej: capital_mobiliario
schema.title: Tipo Renta

parameters.description: Tipo de renta u operacion economica, ej: capital_mobiliario

parameters.name: tipo_operacion

schema.description: Tipo de operacion, ej: retencion, informativa
schema.title: Tipo Operacion

parameters.description: Tipo de operacion, ej: retencion, informativa

parameters.name: incluir_obligacion_sociedad

schema.description: Incluir modelos propios de la sociedad no derivados de clientes
schema.title: Incluir Obligacion Sociedad

parameters.description: Incluir modelos propios de la sociedad no derivados de clientes

get.description: List AEAT tax form models currently loaded in ESData, with their linked article counts and active campaign box counts. This is not a claim of complete AEAT model coverage or filing applicability.

Get details for a specific AEAT tax model including linked legislation articles, a paginated page of active campaign boxes (casillas), key codes (claves), step-by-step instructions, regulatory framework (normativa), and related doctrine. Use casillas_limit/casillas_offset or /v1/modelos/{codigo}/casillas when all boxes are needed. Use related_limit and articulos_offset for bounded related lists, and continue only when the returned metadata indicates more results.

parameters.name: campana

schema.description: Campana especifica (ej: 2025). Si no se indica, usa la campana persistida internamente.
schema.title: Campana

parameters.description: Campana especifica (ej: 2025). Si no se indica, usa la campana persistida internamente.

parameters.name: casillas_limit

schema.description: Tamano de pagina para casillas incluidas. Use /casillas para navegar el listado completo.
schema.title: Casillas Limit

parameters.description: Tamano de pagina para casillas incluidas. Use /casillas para navegar el listado completo.

parameters.name: related_limit

schema.description: Tamano maximo para listas relacionadas incluidas: articulos, claves, instrucciones y normativa.
schema.title: Related Limit

parameters.description: Tamano maximo para listas relacionadas incluidas: articulos, claves, instrucciones y normativa.

get.description: Return a paginated list of official boxes/fields for an AEAT model campaign. Use limit/offset and continue only when has_more is true. A returned box confirms that the field exists in the model/campaign; it does not prove the box is mandatory for a concrete taxpayer scenario.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Tamano de pagina. Por defecto 200 para evitar respuestas MCP/Actions truncadas.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Tamano de pagina. Por defecto 200 para evitar respuestas MCP/Actions truncadas.

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Desplazamiento para continuar la pagina anterior.
schema.title: Offset

parameters.description: Desplazamiento para continuar la pagina anterior.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Filtro textual sobre codigo, etiqueta o descripcion de la casilla.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Filtro textual sobre codigo, etiqueta o descripcion de la casilla.

get.summary: Ask a grounded Spanish tax/legal query
get.description: Run a grounded ESData fiscal/legal retrieval query. Responses must be treated according to their confidence, relevance, citations, and review_required fields. For any actionable answer, verify source locators in result_metadata.source_verification, cited_chunks, or claim_citations before relying on the result. Do not infer mandatory obligations when the response only returns low-relevance candidates or explicitly requires verification.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Pregunta fiscal en lenguaje natural (ej: 'facta no residente', 'irpf dividendos ue', 'iva entregas intracomunitarias')
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Pregunta fiscal en lenguaje natural (ej: 'facta no residente', 'irpf dividendos ue', 'iva entregas intracomunitarias')

schema.description: Tipo de sujeto: contribuyente, no_residente, empresa, retenedor, etc.
schema.title: Sujeto

schema.description: País/territorio: es, ue, intracomunitario, fuera_ue, etc.

parameters.name: tipo_operacion

schema.description: Tipo de operación: entrega_bienes, prestacion_servicios, dividendos, retencion, etc.
schema.title: Tipo Operacion

parameters.description: Tipo de operación: entrega_bienes, prestacion_servicios, dividendos, retencion, etc.

parameters.name: sources

schema.description: Filtrar fuentes por tipo, separadas por coma. Valores: legislacion, doctrina, pgc, modelos, screening, entities, norms, articles. Si no se indica, usa todas las fuentes por defecto.
schema.title: Sources

parameters.description: Filtrar fuentes por tipo, separadas por coma. Valores: legislacion, doctrina, pgc, modelos, screening, entities, norms, articles. Si no se indica, usa todas las fuentes por defecto.

get.description: Search the loaded ESMA MiCA Crypto-Asset Service Providers register by provider name or registration number. Treat results as authoritative only when quality_signal is official_esma_register and availability_status is populated. If safe_to_answer is false, do not infer that a provider is absent from the real register.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Busqueda por nombre o numero de registro
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Busqueda por nombre o numero de registro

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filtrar por estado: active, suspended, revoked
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filtrar por estado: active, suspended, revoked

parameters.name: only_empty

schema.description: Return only tables that are not safe to answer from directly.
schema.title: Only Empty

parameters.description: Return only tables that are not safe to answer from directly.

get.description: List ESData domain availability statuses, including workflow_empty, allowed_empty, configured_but_unavailable, and populated domains. Use this to explain explicitly when a domain has no current data instead of inventing an answer.
Return the availability status for a specific ESData table or domain. Use this when a query depends on a table that may be empty, unavailable, or intentionally allowed to be empty.
Return freshness and ingestion status for official source families. Use this before answering currency-sensitive questions about tax models, deadlines, legislation, doctrine, or regulatory updates.

parameters.name: ambito

schema.description: Filtrar por ambito (proteccion_datos, derechos_ar, ficheros_datos, cookies)
schema.title: Ambito

parameters.description: Filtrar por ambito (proteccion_datos, derechos_ar, ficheros_datos, cookies)

get.description: List official AEPD documents loaded by ESData. Responses include `items`, `total`, `url_aepd`, and pagination metadata. Do not treat missing sanctioning resolutions as loaded unless the response explicitly returns them.
Search official AEPD documents by title or text. Use `url_aepd`/`url_fuente` as the cited official source and do not mix these guidance/document results with consolidated BOE legal articles.
Return full text and official AEPD source URL for a loaded AEPD document.
